caseB-matching.last_note: Core Lemma M (finite matching menu => A<=1/D) REFUTED by exact n=3 counterexample (menu best 0.0683>1/15, cascade 0.0288); menu framing insufficient for hard regime. Salvaged+certified Lemma X, Reduction 1, Reduction 2
caseB-matching.summary: Finite matching-exchange for the Case-B upper bound: XY menu = matchings (cut larger at smaller -> cancelling copy) + halve singletons; best matching forces A<=1/D. Induction-free, non-graveyard. Reuses G1/R/H + direct-constructive lower bound. Open core: Lemma M exchange proof.

direct-constructive.last_note: Certified reformulation A>=1<=>E_F<=O_G and injection N_F<=N_G+1=>A>=1; honest: true minimiser has E_F>0, both bypasses fail, residual=within-group flat move on tight face E_F=O_G.
direct-constructive.summary: Explicit optimal strategies both sides: greedy=odd-ranked reduction, LB geometric marks + dominance identity (lower bound), XY interleave+halve response (upper bound).

induction-recursion.last_note: n->(n-1) game separation H2 refuted (F1 budget non-decrement, F2 global re-ranking); Step1 + AltSum reformulation salvaged but engine broken
induction-recursion.summary: Induction on n via recursion c(n)=2c(n-1)/(2c(n-1)+1); decompose game at big-piece boundary into renormalized (n-1)-subgame. Crux: game-separation lemma H2.

potential-duality.summary: Certify game value with a single dyadic-ladder potential Phi that upper-bounds under XY play and lower-bounds under LB play, meeting at c(n). Crux: explicit closed-form Phi (P2), vacuity risk.

upper-general-cascade.last_note: arithmetic overclaim corrected (3*2^(n-2)/D); certified GreedyCascade closes B2-large all n; residual B2-small a1<1/2 open
upper-general-cascade.summary: Copy of direct-constructive focusing new work on general-n Case-B upper bound: strengthened dual-bound induction IH+(m) (carry sum AND max<2^{m-1}/D) + B2 double-pair-cancel entry; imports lower bound and IH(q<=4).

upper-vertex-reduction.last_note: (V) killed; certified f-homogeneous, sigma-migration, TwoLevelCascade; sole gap c2b q>=5 (bulk of flat residual, adaptive).
upper-vertex-reduction.summary: Different-framing upper bound: global PL-max-at-vertex characterization of f(b)=min_XY A over the hard-regime polytope K_q; vertices classified T(tie->IH(q-1))/G(gap=1/D->Red2)/S(sum-boundary geometric leaf). Evades r6 step-descent + r3 concavity. Imports lower bound + IH(q<=4).
